description_long: This object is a historical-style cannon mounted on a wooden carriage with four solid wheels. The cannon barrel is made of metal, featuring several reinforcing rings and a slightly flared muzzle. The carriage is constructed from dark, weathered wood, reinforced with metal bands and bolts, and is wrapped with thick rope for added structural integrity. The wheels are also wooden, with visible metal hubs and rivets. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for deployment in defensive or offensive urban scenarios. The surface of the cannon and carriage shows signs of wear, giving it an authentic, battle-worn appearance.
description: A weathered metal cannon mounted on a reinforced wooden carriage with four solid wheels and rope detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle of the cannon and the symmetrical alignment of the wheels and carriage.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the cannon barrel, the wooden carriage, and the rope wrapped around the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back end of the cannon barrel and the rear wheels, with rope and metal reinforcements visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cannon barrel, carriage, and rope, but from the opposite side.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One fixed large-caliber cannon mounted centrally on the wooden carriage.
attribute_armor_plating: None visible; the carriage is reinforced with metal bands but lacks dedicated armor plating.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; surfaces are solid gray and dark brown with no discernible camouflage pattern.
